title: AI/ML Career Roadmap Indore
title_highlight: Way to Become An AI/ML Engineer In 2026
short_description: Discover the exact roadmap Indore students are using to break into AI/ML roles — even without coding background. Learn what to study, what to skip, and how to actually get hired.
subtitle: Stop Wasting Time On Random Tutorials. Learn The Exact Step-by-Step Roadmap To Become An AI/ML Engineer — Even If You're Starting From Zero.
instructor_bio:
Founder of CodingSharks, Adarsh has trained 1000+ students in Indore and helped them transition from confusion to clarity in tech careers.
With 6+ years of real development experience, he specializes in simplifying complex AI/ML concepts into practical, job-ready skills.
His mission is to help Tier-2/Tier-3 students crack high-paying tech roles without wasting years.
instructor_title: AI Career Mentor & Full Stack Developer
instructor_quote: AI/ML is not hard — confusion is. Once you get the right roadmap, everything becomes simple.
why_join_items: Understand the exact roadmap to become AI/ML Engineer from scratch
Avoid 90% of mistakes students in Indore are making right now
Learn what companies actually expect from freshers in AI roles
Get clarity between Data Science, AI, ML & Software roles
Discover high-paying opportunities beyond traditional engineering jobs
See real student case studies from Indore who cracked tech roles

faq.question: IS THIS FOR BEGINNERS?
faq.answer: Yes, this workshop is designed for absolute beginners. Even if you have zero coding knowledge, you will understand the roadmap clearly.

faq.question: DO I NEED CODING EXPERIENCE?
faq.answer: No. We will explain everything from scratch and show you how to start your journey step-by-step.

faq.question: WILL THIS HELP ME GET A JOB?
faq.answer: Yes — this workshop gives you the exact roadmap, skills and strategy needed to move towards a job in AI/ML.

testimonials.name: Sneha Patel
testimonials.text: The workshop broke down complex AI concepts into simple, actionable steps. I built my first AI-powered app within 3 weeks of the course.

testimonials.name: Karan Singh
testimonials.text: I had zero technical background but this workshop made AI concepts so accessible. Now I lead AI product initiatives at my company.

testimonials.name: Ananya Roy
testimonials.text: Ravi sir explains things brilliantly. The hands-on projects gave me the confidence to apply for top AI research positions.
